prompt: i want to understand the debate around zig vs rust for systems programming. pull together the best youtube videos on it into a notebook and give me an analysis of the main arguments on each side, with the view counts and which channels they came from.

assertions.text: Found ~10 YouTube videos and created a NotebookLM notebook from them
Added the videos as notebook sources (notebook_id present in output/manifest)
Analysis addresses the actual question (arguments for each side of zig vs rust), grounded in the sources
Saved a Markdown report to the vault under notebooklm/<topic>/
Showed the report content in chat, not just a 'saved to path' message
Report includes YouTube metadata: view counts and channel names (and engagement ratios)
